title: Ruth Brown
compiled_truth: Ruth Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-09 to 2001-05-30), Ruth Brown sent 5 and received 31 emails, totalling 36 interactions. Top correspondents: [V&V Force](people/v-v-force) (3), [Joseph Sutton](people/joseph-sutton) (2), [V&V Assistants](people/v-v-assistants) (2), [James Bannantine](people/james-bannantine) (1), [Cliff Baxter](people/cliff-baxter) (1).
